0.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Occasional linear atelectasis in both lungs

2.text: Consolidation with air bronchogram in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Surrounding ground glass opacity in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Nodular ground glass opacities in the superior segment of both lower lobes

5.text: Nodular ground glass opacities in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe
